zh.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale是Robert Munro of Carbisdale的女兒，於大約1526年出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾。她於1550年與Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年之後在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale是Robert Munro of Carbisdale的女儿，于大约1526年出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾。她于1550年与Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年之后在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Munro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic Rothach ‘man from Ro’. According to tradition which may be substantially correct, the ancestors of the Munros came from Ireland, from the foot of the river Roe in Derry, whence the name Bun-rotha, giving Mun-rotha by eclipsis of b after the preposition in’. See also Monroe , compare Munroe .
History: This (see 1 above) is the name of a Scottish clan with an ancestral seat at Foulis Castle, near Evanton, Ross-shire.

variants.name: Mulroy
meanings: Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolruaidh ‘descendant of Maolruadh’, a personal name composed of the elements maol ‘chief’ + ruadh ‘red’, i.e. ‘red-haired chieftain’. This surname, from has sometimes been changed to Munroe (see Munro ).

variants.name: Monroe
meanings: History: Scottish bearers of this name are descended from Donald O’Kane, who in the 11th century migrated from the mouth of the Roe to Ferrindonald in Cromarty, Scotland. There his descendants, as barons of Foulis and vassals of the earls of Ross, held lands along the Firth of Cromarty. James Monroe (1758–1831), 5th president of the US (1817–25), came from a cadet branch of this family.

variants.name: Munroe
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Munro  .

en.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale was born about 1526, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert Munro of Carbisdale. She married Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie in 1550, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died after 1560, in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale est née environ 1526, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Robert Munro of Carbisdale. Elle a épousé Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie en 1550, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée après 1560, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale wurde um 1526 in Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Robert Munro of Carbisdale geboren. Sie hat 1550 in Schottland, United Kingdom Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1560 in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale è nata il circa 1526 nel Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di Robert Munro of Carbisdale. Lei sposato Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie nel 1550, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì dopo il 1560, nel Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdaleは約1526年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアでRobert Munro of Carbisdaleの娘として生まれた。1550年にイギリススコットランドでHugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年以後にイギリススコットランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale(은)는 대략 1526년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르에서 Robert Munro of Carbisdale의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1550년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했다.

mn.Kincardineshire, Scotland: A' Mhaoirne, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale nasceu aproximadamente 1526, em Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de Robert Munro of Carbisdale. Ela casou-se com Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie em 1550, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1560, em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale родилась около 1526 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Robert Munro of Carbisdale. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie в 1550 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла после 1560 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1526–after 1560: e tusa o le 1526–ina ua ma'ea le 1560

es.lifeSummary: Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale nació aproximadamente 1526, en Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de Robert Munro of Carbisdale. Se casó con Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie en 1550, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió después de 1560, en Escocia, Reino Unido.
